case_title: XIAN SHAN WU VS. NEW ON SAN POULTRY CO.,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIAN SHAN AS TO DEFENDANT NEW ON SAN POULTRY CO.,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON ON SANG POULTRY CO.,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HOO, SUAZNNE AS AN INDIVIDUAL JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGEMNET AND TO VACATE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT, SUZANNE HOO, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIAN SHAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIAN SHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW ON SAN POULTRY CO.,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATI ON ON SANG POULTRY CO.,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HOO, SUAZNNE AS AN INDIVIDUAL JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY $17,070.99 PRINCIPAL, $198.65 INTEREST, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,397.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
